task_completion.description: Open the draw.io Desktop application to create the floor plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io (diagrams.net) Desktop application window is visible on the screen with a new or active canvas.

task_completion.description: Draw the structural elements of the apartment including walls, doors, and windows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines, rectangles, and arcs representing walls, doors, and windows are visible on the draw.io canvas, forming a coherent apartment layout.

task_completion.description: Add furniture shapes to the floor plan as specified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Various furniture shapes (e.g., beds, sofas, dining tables, chairs, bathroom fixtures, kitchen appliances) are placed inside the respective rooms on the draw.io canvas.

task_completion.description: Label each of the 8 distinct spaces with its name and dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text boxes are visible inside the rooms containing room names (e.g., 'Master Bedroom', 'Kitchen', 'Entry Foyer') along with their dimensions (e.g., '14\' x 12\'').

task_completion.description: Include a title block with the specified apartment listing details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box or title block is visible on the canvas containing the exact text: 'Unit 38F - 2BR/2BA - 1,150 sq ft - MiMA Tower'.

task_completion.description: Save the editable diagram and export the final view as a PNG to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The files 'apartment_floorplan.drawio' and 'apartment_floorplan.png' are visible on the Desktop, or save/export dialogs show these exact filenames being saved to the ~/Desktop directory.

integrity.description: The agent must use the draw.io GUI to create the diagram, not terminal commands or scripts to generate the XML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with the draw.io interface, dragging shapes from the sidebar, and typing text into the canvas.

integrity.description: The floor plan must be constructed from individual shapes, not just an imported image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The floor plan consists of multiple selectable vector shapes and text boxes in draw.io, rather than a single flat image pasted onto the canvas.

integrity.description: The agent must not download a pre-made floor plan from the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not use a web browser to search for, download, or copy an existing floor plan image or template of MiMA Tower.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final files must be saved to ~/Desktop as 'apartment_floorplan.drawio' and 'apartment_floorplan.png'. The floor plan must contain at least 30 shapes (walls, doors, windows, furniture) and at least 6 of the 8 required room labels (foyer, living, kitchen, master bedroom, master bath, closet, second bedroom, second bath) with dimensions. Expected furniture includes beds, sofa, tables, chairs, toilets, sinks, showers, stove, refrigerator, desk, and TV.
